text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The arXiv ID 2407.15261 exists but corresponds to a paper titled "Pandora's Box Problem With Time Constraints," not "Pandora's box problem over time." Additionally, the real paper has 7 authors (Amanatidis, Berger, Ezra, Feldman, Fusco, Reiffenhäuser, Tsikiridis), while the cited reference lists only 4, omitting Berger, Ezra, and Feldman entirely. Both the title and the author list are incorrect as cited.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.15261
